laws.name: t_support_face_in_x12_base,_x13_x15_x17
laws.statement: if support_face in {x12_base, x13_x15_x17} then t = 25000

laws.name: t_support_bucket_in_x12_base,_x13_x15_x17
laws.statement: if support_bucket in {x12_base, x13_x15_x17} then t = 25000

laws.name: t_threshold_zone_in_boundary,_high,_low
laws.statement: if threshold_zone in {boundary, high, low} then t = 25000

laws.name: r_a6_>=_72_and_a6_positive_==_True
laws.statement: if a6 >= 72 and a6_positive == True then r = 6
